title: Zero In Fly Go! USB Rechargeable Fly Repellent Fan Portable Fly Fan for Outdoor Eating, Barbecues and Picnics
features: EFFECTIVE: Poison-free fly deterrent for use in and around homes, including patios and outdoor dining areas
RECHARGEABLE: The unit is powered by a rechargeable lithium battery pack to provide hours of fly repellent motion USB rechargeable cable supplied
2 IN 1 USE: Can be used either hanging or free-standing, on tabletops and other affected areas, for effective and trouble-free control of nuisance flies
SAFE: Child and pet safe flexible blades The two blades rotate at the top of the unit to produce iridescent light and air movement that keeps flies at bay
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS The Zero In range of products from STV International provide pest control solutions for a variety of household pests, including bed bugs, ants, flies, wasps, clothes moths, and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Fly Go USB Rechargeable Fan Repeller The perfect poison-free fly deterrent Ideal for use both in and outside the home. The integrated hanging hook can be used to suspend the Fly Go fan under parasols or where food is located to keeps flies free from the area. The soft flexible blades wont hurt if touched so safe to use around children and pets. Use outdoors where food is located or position next to food when enjoying an al fresco picnic. Recharge using the USB charger. Effective poison-free fly deterrent ideal for indoor and outdoor use Free-standing tabletop design Integral base hang-hook also enables parasol hanging Child and pet safe flexible blades USB rechargeable batteries supplied For Home & Garden Ideal for use inside and outside the home. Just stand it up and turn it on to repel insects from the desired area. Child & Pet Safe The soft flexible blades wont hurt if touched so safe to use around children and pets. Easy To Use Just simply stand it on the table or use the integrated hanging hook to suspend the Fly Go fan under parasols. Simply recharge it via USB when needed. Non-Chemical Solution This poison free pest solution is the perfect insect control option that keeps them away without the use of any nasty chemicals or poisons.
